applies_to: All leagues with spring + summer two-split structure
description: Combined annual ranking using accumulated spring and summer placement points. Summer champion is guaranteed 1st overall via the 20-point bonus (max any non-champion can earn = 19).

ranking_rules.tiebreaker: summer_rank ascending (lower summer rank = higher combined rank)
notes: Summer champion always receives 20 summer points, guaranteeing 1st overall (max competing total = 19).
No special-case logic needed — purely additive.

season_review_display.set_stats: combined across both splits (spring regular + spring playoffs + summer regular + summer playoffs)
season_review_display.intl_tickets: distributed based on combined rank, using per-league INTL_SPOTS config
